PostToolUse.command: if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'src/styles/App.module.css'; then HEX=$(grep -En '#[0-9a-fA-F]{3,8}' src/styles/App.module.css | grep -v 'var(--' || true); PX=$(grep -En '(padding|margin|gap):\s*[0-9]+px' src/styles/App.module.css | grep -v 'var(--' || true); if [ -n "$HEX" ]; then echo "WARNING: Hardcoded hex colors found in App.module.css (use design tokens instead):"; echo "$HEX"; fi; if [ -n "$PX" ]; then echo "WARNING: Hardcoded pixel values for spacing found in App.module.css (use design tokens instead):"; echo "$PX"; fi; fi
